/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch x86_64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o SphereKeyframe.ofx.bundle/Contents/MacOS/SphereKeyframe CMakeFiles/SphereKeyframe.dir/src/SphereKeyframe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereKeyframe.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsCore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereKeyframe.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsImageEffect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereKeyframe.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsInteract.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereKeyframe.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsLog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereKeyframe.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsMultiThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereKeyframe.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsParams.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereKeyframe.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsProperty.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereKeyframe.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsPropertyValidation.cpp.o
